experiment: free inference-time floor rung 3 — WM-MPPI/CEM planning over the flagship v1 world model vs the single-step re-plan

arms.A_open_plan_bike: single-shot open-loop (plan once, track frozen; predictor never stepped)
arms.B_closed_bike: single-step re-plan (imagination-in-the-loop, pure-pursuit inverse) = the -0.213 baseline
arms.C_mpc_bike: receding-horizon WM MPPI/CEM: sample K action seqs, roll each through the WM, select by GT-free cost (track anchor + progress + comfort). ONLY the action selection differs from B

val: physicalai-val-0c5f7dac3b11 ep_00000..ep_00011 (held-out subset, same as the -0.213 proof)

compute.registry_reference: CEM ~20.8 ms @ K=8 (RETRACTION_LOG 07-21: encode once + broadcast, NOT re-encode per candidate)
compute.note: batch=1 single-ego deploy-tick timing in wm_mpc_result.json timing_batch1

sanity_check.note: arms A/B produced by the UNMODIFIED closedloop functions reproduce the imagination proof EXACTLY -> harness wiring valid -> the C reading is admissible

headline_result.verdict: TIE (ADE + divergence); CI-separated WORSE on the lateral off-road proxy

timing_batch1_ms_per_decision_single_ego.note: all comfortably under the 100 ms / 10 Hz tick; feasibility not the blocker, efficacy is

final_verdict: TIE — WM-MPPI/CEM planning does NOT beat the single-step re-plan; every WM-cost config ties (best K16 delta +0.005), the one separated config (kinematic bike-cost) is WORSE, and the lateral off-road proxy is separated-worse. Do NOT promote rung 3 on this evidence; deferred (not refuted) to an AlpaSim-validated test. Compute is real-time.
caveats: self-referential (WM is both state estimator and simulator) — mechanism proof, not a safety rate
kinematic no-renderer harness; off-road = large lateral-deviation proxy
n=12 val episodes; arms paired on identical windows so the DELTA is the robust part
harness VALIDATED for inference-mechanism proofs, REFUTED for training (DAgger); rung 3 is inference-only
AlpaSim (faithful, non-self-referential) is the decision-grade confirmer
